description: OpenTelemetry metrics emitted by the github.com/ueisele/s3store library. Assumes the OTel→Prometheus exporter default naming (counters get _total, durations get _seconds, byte sizes get _bytes, curly-brace units like {request} are dropped) and that cluster / stage / k8s_namespace_name resource labels are propagated onto every s3store_* series.

panels.title: Overview — all stores (independent of bucket / prefix)
Active stores
panels.description: Distinct (bucket, prefix) tuples that produced any method call in the last 5 min.

targets.expr: count(count by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"}[5m])))

panels.title: Method calls / s
panels.description: Total library-method invocation rate across all stores (writes + reads + lookups).

targets.expr: sum(rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Method error rate
panels.description: Share of method calls classified outcome=error (excludes outcome=canceled).

targets.expr: sum(rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_outcome="error"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: S3 inflight (sum)
panels.description: Sum of in-flight S3 requests holding a Target semaphore slot — across every store.

targets.expr: sum(s3store_target_inflight{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"})

panels.title: Top stores by method call rate

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])))
topk(10, sum by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_outcome="error"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Top stores by S3 request rate

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (rate(s3store_s3_request_count_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])))
topk(10, sum by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (s3store_target_inflight{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace"}))

sum by (s3store_method) (rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_method_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by (s3store_outcome) (rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (error_type, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_method_calls_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix", s3store_outcome="error"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Records / Write call (P50 / P95)
panels.description: Distribution of records committed per Write or WriteWithKey call.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_write_records_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_write_records_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Partitions / Write call (P50 / P95)
panels.description: Distinct partition keys touched by Write (always 1 for WriteWithKey).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_write_partitions_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_write_partitions_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Bytes / Write call (P50 / P95)
panels.description: Total parquet body bytes uploaded per Write or WriteWithKey call.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_write_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_write_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Write throughput (records/s, bytes/s)
panels.description: Sustained write throughput derived from histogram _sum.

targets.expr: sum(rate(s3store_write_records_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum(rate(s3store_write_bytes_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Records / read call (P50 / P95)
panels.description: Records returned per Read / ReadIter / ReadRangeIter / Poll / PollRecords / Lookup / BackfillIndex call.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_read_records_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_read_records_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_read_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_read_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_read_files_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_method) (rate(s3store_read_files_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))
sum(rate(s3store_read_records_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum(rate(s3store_read_bytes_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum(rate(s3store_read_files_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_request_count_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: S3 request duration P95 by operation

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: S3 attempts P95 by operation
panels.description: Outer retry() attempts per S3 wrapper call. Anything > 1 means at least one retry fired.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_request_attempts_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by (s3store_operation, error_type) (rate(s3store_s3_request_count_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix", s3store_outcome="error"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: PUT request body size P95 / P99

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_request_body_size_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_request_body_size_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: GET response body size P95 / P99

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_response_body_size_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, s3store_operation) (rate(s3store_s3_response_body_size_bytes_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: S3 inflight (gauge)
panels.description: Current S3 requests holding a Target semaphore slot.

targets.expr: sum by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (s3store_target_inflight{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"})

panels.title: S3 acquire waiters (gauge)
panels.description: Goroutines currently blocked on the Target semaphore. Sustained > 0 = saturation, increase MaxInflightRequests.

targets.expr: sum by (s3store_bucket, s3store_prefix) (s3store_target_waiting{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"})

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_target_semaphore_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_target_semaphore_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by (s3store_outcome) (rate(s3store_target_semaphore_acquires_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Items per fan-out call (P50 / P95)
panels.description: Distribution of items dispatched per fan-out call (s3store internal concurrency primitive).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_fanout_items_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_fanout_items_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Workers per fan-out call (P50 / P95)
panels.description: Worker goroutines actually spawned per fan-out call (capped at min(concurrency, items)).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_fanout_workers_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_fanout_workers_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Iter pipeline saturation — selected bucket / prefix
Body-slot exhausted rate
panels.description: Times the iter pipeline's body-slot pool was full and a downloader had to wait. Recurring > 0 means MaxInflightDownloads is the bottleneck.

targets.expr: sum(rate(s3store_read_iter_body_slot_exhausted_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_body_slot_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_body_slot_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Byte-budget exhausted rate
panels.description: Times the iter pipeline's byte budget was full and the decoder had to wait. Recurring > 0 means ReadAheadBytes is too small for the workload.

targets.expr: sum(rate(s3store_read_iter_byte_budget_exhausted_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_byte_budget_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_byte_budget_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Partition decode duration P50 / P95 / P99
panels.description: Wall-clock parquet decode time per partition (excludes byte-budget wait).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_partition_decode_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_partition_decode_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(s3store_read_iter_partition_decode_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stage=~"$stage", k8s_namespace_name=~"$namespace", s3store_bucket=~"$bucket", s3store_prefix=~"$prefix"}[$__rate_interval])))

title: s3store
